title: Onion Dijon Crusted Catfish — Seafood
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Onion Dijon Crusted Catfish — Seafood Catfish fillets are seasoned with honey mustard and onion, then baked until golden brown in this easy main dish.

title: Make Ahead Butter Balls — Refrigerator Cookie
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Make Ahead Butter Balls — Refrigerator Cookie This recipe uses a make ahead mix that can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 4 weeks. Add the following ingredients to the mix for buttery cookies.

title: Vegetable Salad — Zucchini Salad with Herbs and Red Onion
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Vegetable Salad — Zucchini Salad with Herbs and Red Onion A lovely fresh zucchini salad with mint, basil, and red onion. Use a spiralizer or potato peeler to slice the zucchini as thin as possible.

title: Risotto with Butternut Squash and White Beans — Main Dishes
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Risotto with Butternut Squash and White Beans — Main Dishes The ideal flavorful dish for a weeknight or entertaining your favorite guests is a steamed butternut squash that has been folded into a creamy white bean risotto.

title: Drinks — Homemade Dill Pickle Vodka
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Drinks — Homemade Dill Pickle Vodka Make your own dill pickle-infused vodka and serve up some excellent martinis at your next cocktail party.

title: Appetizers and Snacks — Traditional Beef Samosas
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Appetizers and Snacks — Traditional Beef Samosas These wonton-wrapped beef samosas are flavored with a variety of spices, including cumin, coriander, and garam masala.

title: Yeast Bread — Finnish Pulla
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Yeast Bread — Finnish Pulla A unique bread with a sweet flavor that makes a wonderful holiday gift! It takes about 4 hours to make, so allow yourself plenty of time.

title: Appetizers and Snacks — Bacon-Ranch Cheese Ball
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Appetizers and Snacks — Bacon-Ranch Cheese Ball This is an extra bacon-y version of a classic ranch cheese ball. If you’re a bacon or ranch lover (or both), this is the cheese ball dreams are made of, and will be a staple appetizer for entertaining.

title: Chicken Spaghetti Bake
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Cheddar cheese bakes over a creamy combination of chicken and spaghetti in this comforting dish.

title: Sweet ’n’ Spicy Baked Chicken — Chicken Breast
author: Kirill Shevch
summary: Sweet ’n’ Spicy Baked Chicken — Chicken Breast This quick and easy chicken breast baked in the oven with Sweet Baby Ray’s BBQ sauce is tasty. Add honey, brown sugar, and Thai-style chile-garlic sauce to your favorite barbeque sauce to get a terrific baste and dipping sauce for chicken breasts. #spicy baked chicken, #sweet baby ray, #sweet \n, #meat and…
